title: oparanthus coriaceus
intro: Oparanthus coriaceus, also known as the tough-leaved opalroot, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oparanthus coriaceus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Oparanthus coriaceus can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
